definitions.aryepiglottic part of oblique arytenoid: A part of the oblique arytenoid muscle whose fibers continue past the apex of the arytenoid cartilage, traveling laterally through the aryepiglottic fold to reach the epiglottis, and which functions as a sphincter and weak adductor of the laryngeal inlet.

aryepiglottic part of oblique arytenoid.uberon_definition: The aryepiglotticus is a muscle of the larynx running in the aryepiglottic fold from the arytenoid cartilage to the epiglottis.
aryepiglottic part of oblique arytenoid.note: NTR term is already represented in UBERON as UBERON:0011025 with exact synonym 'ary-epiglottic part of oblique arytenoid'. FMA:46602 is the FMA xref on UBERON:0011025. The parent FMA:46583 (oblique arytenoid) maps to UBERON:0008575.
